auth: session cookie + gateway secret + live csrf pair

data.html: HTML fragment of the client's engagement + reports tables

parsing: In data.html, engagement rows are tr[id='clientRow_{clientId}_engagements_row_{auditId}']. The auditId is in the row id. Row class carries state (Active/Inactive/Archived). Cell .engagementName = label, cell .customId = engagement code. Skip the ..._row_empty placeholder.
notes: This is the client -> engagements map. Sibling auditIds under one clientId are the same client's different-year audits.
